notableEvents.label: Joe Mack GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Joe Mack grounds into a double play, pitcher Michael McGreevy to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Owen Caissie out at 2nd. Joe Mack out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Michael McGreevy picks off Esteury Ruiz at 1st on throw to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández lines out sharply to shortstop Masyn Winn.

notableEvents.label: Heriberto Hernández pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Heriberto Hernández pops out to first baseman Alec Burleson in foul territory.
